# Task B7: User Service Authentication Branch

## Overview
This branch implements user service authentication functionality for the BerthCare platform.

## Status
- Branch Created: 2025-09-30
- Branch Name: `feat/user-service-auth`
- Base Branch: `main`
- Status: In Progress

## Objectives
- Implement user authentication endpoints
- Add JWT token generation and validation
- Implement password hashing and security
- Add user registration and login flows
- Implement session management
- Add authentication middleware

## Dependencies
- Task B6 (completed): Backend infrastructure setup
